title: Public Deployment and Release Operations
objective: 在严格遵守 L4 人类授权的前提下，将用户端部署到公网，完成生产 SEO、资产策略、回滚演练和上线留档

tasks.title: Prepare Cloudflare or Vercel deployment configuration
acceptance_criteria: Deployment target, build command, output directory and environment requirements are documented
Admin routes and private source files are excluded from public deployment
No deployment is executed without explicit human approval
tasks.notes: This task may prepare config but must not silently deploy.

tasks.title: Finalize production SEO and feed checks
acceptance_criteria: Canonical URLs, sitemap, robots, RSS and Atom are verified for production domain
Private or admin URLs are absent from sitemap and feeds
Release checklist includes social preview metadata verification
tasks.notes: Use current domain decisions from release documents.

tasks.title: Define R2 or CDN large asset strategy
acceptance_criteria: Large PDFs, images and generated packages have a documented storage strategy
Upload and deletion rollback procedures are documented
No asset upload is performed without explicit human L4 approval
tasks.notes: R2 is allowed only through publication-channel-policy gates.

tasks.title: Create release report and approval gate
acceptance_criteria: Report records commit hash, build outputs, test results, visual checks and known risks
Report includes an explicit human approval placeholder before deployment
Report distinguishes local verification from actual external deployment
tasks.notes: Approval must be captured before any L4 action.

tasks.title: Execute deployment only after approval
acceptance_criteria: Deployment command is run only after human explicitly authorizes it
Deployment URL, timestamp and commit hash are recorded
No social publishing or unrelated external mutation is performed
tasks.notes: This is L4 and requires human approval. Agent must not do it silently.

tasks.title: Run production smoke test and rollback drill
acceptance_criteria: Smoke test verifies homepage, notes, projects, graph, resume, feeds and sitemap
Rollback drill identifies the exact previous deployment or revert path
Any production issue is recorded with severity and next action
tasks.notes: Smoke testing is external read unless remediation requires external write.
